data.title: Combat veteran Marcell Strbich leads Robert Sprague in GOP SOS race, per internal poll by co/efficient conducted between Jan 20-22.
data.description: In Dayton, Ohio, a poll conducted by the Strbich for Ohio campaign between January 20 and January 22, 2026, revealed significant insights. The survey, carried out by respected polling firm co/efficient, provided key data on political outsider and combat veteran Marcell. The findings, shared on January 27, 2026, shed light on important numbers that could impact the upcoming election.

data.title: Heart conditions in youth can be asymptomatic. National Youth Heart Screening Day on Feb 7, 2026, aims to identify risks.
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, on January 27, 2026, the "Every Kid. Every Heart." campaign emphasizes the importance of screening for heart conditions in children, as they may appear healthy despite underlying issues. National Youth Heart Screening Day is scheduled for February 7, 2026, across the country to detect potential risks early. This initiative aims to promote heart health awareness among the youth population.

data.title: Bidgely unveils new strategy for AI at DistribuTECH International 2026 in San Diego, transforming utility data.
data.description: Bidgely, a company based in Los Altos, California, is set to showcase the latest advancements in artificial intelligence (AI) at DistribuTECH International 2026 in San Diego. The event, scheduled from February 2-5 at the San Diego Convention Center, will have Bidgely at Upper Level Booth #201. Presenting under the theme "AI Built for Your Reality," Bidgely aims to shift the focus from theoretical AI to practical, large-scale implementation. Their goal is to transform scattered utility data into a comprehensive layer of intelligence that can be utilized behind-the-meter. The company plans to push the industry conversation forward, emphasizing the importance of scalable AI solutions in the real world.
Christian Dior shines amidst economic uncertainty with strong results despite global challenges.

data.title: U.S. intervention in yen market could impact Bitcoin; selling dollars, buying yen is key. Decisive action expected.
data.description: Analysts suggest that potential American intervention in the Japanese yen market could impact Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies. Crypto analyst Ali Martinez highlighted that this intervention would involve selling dollars and buying yen, a significant move in foreign exchange markets. In the past, coordinated actions like this have shown a stronger impact compared to Japan acting independently. Japan's motivation stems from a weak yen, increasing domestic bond yields, and actions taken by the Bank of Japan. This development underlines an unexpected connection between yen movements and Bitcoin.

data.title: Noble Chicken partners with Oakley Greens, enhancing food program since Jan 13, 2026. Significant collaboration for brand.
data.description: A well-known Cincinnati destination has recently enhanced its food offerings with the introduction of Noble Chicken on January 13th, 2026. This fast-casual concept, developed by Wings and Rings, aims to elevate the dining experience at the popular spot. The initiative began on January 13th, 2026, and marks a significant upgrade to the food program. Located in Cincinnati, this establishment is set to attract a larger customer base with its revamped menu.

data.title: InventHelp client creates biodegradable BARLEY STRAW to reduce waste from plastic or paper straws.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 27, 2026, an inventor from Irvine, California, shared their motivation for creating the BARLEY STRAW, a biodegradable alternative to traditional drinking straws. The inventor recognized the need for a more sustainable option and devised a solution to curb the disposal of plastic or paper straws. This innovation has the potential to significantly decrease the amount of waste generated by conventional straws, contributing to environmental conservation efforts.

data.title: Central Steel Fabricators, owned by Live Ventures Inc., plays a key role in AI and data center growth. (#NASDAQ: LIVE)
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Central Steel Fabricators, based in Las Vegas and Broadview, Illinois, emphasized its growing significance as a crucial infrastructure supplier to the swiftly advancing artificial intelligence (AI), automation, and data center industry. The company, a subsidiary of Live Ventures Incorporated (traded publicly as NASDAQ: LIVE), is playing an increasingly vital role in supporting this sector's expansion.

data.title: Jorge Rivera-Agosto of Greenberg Traurig receives AHLA's 2025 Excellence in Adjunct Teaching Award in Albany.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Jorge Rivera-Agosto, a member of the Health Care & FDA Practice at Greenberg Traurig, LLP in Albany, was honored with the 2025 Excellence in Adjunct Teaching Award by the American Health Law Association (AHLA). This prestigious recognition highlights Rivera-Agosto's commitment to legal education and expertise in the health care sector.

data.title: Truist Financial Corp declares $0.52 dividend per common share, payable on March 2 to shareholders as of Feb 13.
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina on January 27, 2026 - The Board of Directors of Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) has announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.52 per common share. This dividend is scheduled to be paid out on March 2, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as such on February 13, 2026.

data.title: Spear Education partners with Overjet to use AI for better diagnosis. Combining education and AI to improve dental practice.
data.description: Spear Education, a top provider of advanced dental education and team training, has unveiled a new collaboration in Scottsdale, Arizona on January 27, 2026. This collaboration integrates AI-assisted diagnostics with educational resources to support clinicians in applying their knowledge effectively in daily practice. Spear Education aims to equip professionals with the skills and confidence needed to deliver optimal care.

data.title: FastGen by NVIDIA speeds up AI video generation 100x with open-source library. 14B parameter models train in 16 hrs on 64 H100 GPUs.
data.description: NVIDIA has introduced FastGen, a new open-source library designed to enhance diffusion models by speeding them up significantly, with acceleration rates reaching up to 100 times faster. Notably, this advancement allows for the training of video models with an extensive 14 billion parameters in just 16 hours. This process, which previously required more time for completion, can now be completed in such a short timeframe by utilizing 64 H100 GPUs simultaneously.

data.title: Axis Capital Holdings (NYSE: AXS) to report quarterly earnings on 2026-01-28; analysts predict EPS of $3.06. Investors await surpassing estimates and upbeat guidance. Guidance crucial for stock movement. EPS past beat by $0.41.
data.description: Axis Capital Holdings (NYSE: AXS) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on January 28, 2026. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of $3.06 for the company. Investors are eagerly anticipating the announcement, hoping for results that exceed expectations and positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. It is essential for new investors to recognize the impact that guidance can have on stock prices. In previous earnings reports, Axis Capital Holdings surpassed expectations by $0.41. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
